task_description: Add two sports video games to the wishlist and then adjust the wishlist to a compact view showing only discounted game items.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in view shows Steam’s top search field with the text input area active and containing the partially entered text "fc 2". The caret is at the end of the text, indicating more characters are being entered into the search box rather than selecting a result. Directly below, a dark dropdown labeled with search results shows matching items such as "EA SPORTS FC™ 26", "《EA SPORTS FC™ 25》", "Too Many F*cking Nazis", and "Drunken FC". In the full-screen context, this is the Steam store window in Chinese, with the search bar near the top right and the search results panel open over the storefront.
caption.think: The user is typing a game title into Steam search. Since the action is explicitly a Type action, the intent is to continue entering the full query "FC 26" into the active search field, likely refining the visible results toward EA SPORTS FC 26.
caption.action: Type "FC 26" into the active Steam search box, replacing the current partial query or completing it so the field reads "FC 26".
caption.expectation: The search field should display "FC 26", and the dropdown search results should update to more closely match that exact query, with EA SPORTS FC 26 likely remaining at or near the top.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The view shows Steam’s top search field containing the text "fc 26" with a dark dropdown of search results directly beneath it. The top result is "EA SPORTS FC™ 26," followed by "《EA SPORTS FC™ 25》" and other matching items. There is no red X marker; the full-screen context shows the Steam store homepage in Chinese with the search panel open and the query ready to submit.
caption.think: The user has finished entering the search term and now wants to execute the search rather than click a specific dropdown result. Since the action is explicitly Press ENTER, the intent is to submit the current query for Steam search results.
caption.action: Press ENTER to submit the current Steam search for "fc 26".
caption.expectation: Steam should close the autocomplete dropdown and load the search results page for "fc 26," likely showing EA SPORTS FC 26 results.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped view shows a semitransparent red X centered on the first search result row labeled "EA SPORTS FC™ 26." The row includes the game cover thumbnail on the left, the title text, and small gray platform/library icons beneath it with the text indicating it contains 2 items. In the full-screen Steam search results page, the query "fc 26" is shown in the search field, and this first result appears at the top of the results list with a preview panel for EA SPORTS FC 26 on the right. The target is a result item in the content list, not a toolbar control.
caption.think: The user has already submitted the search and now wants to open the main search result for EA SPORTS FC 26 by selecting the top matching item.
caption.action: Click the top search result row titled "EA SPORTS FC™ 26."
caption.expectation: Steam should open the EA SPORTS FC 26 store page or activate that result, replacing the search results list with the game's detailed page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped view shows the EA SPORTS FC™ 26 Steam store page centered on the main content area. A large black media preview player occupies the left side with left and right chevron arrows over it, and a strip of thumbnail images sits directly below. On the right is the game's header artwork, Chinese description text, review summary, release date, developer and publisher details, and blue tag pills near the bottom. The full-screen view confirms this is the Steam store page for EA SPORTS FC™ 26, with a vertical scrollbar on the far right indicating the page can be moved further downward.
caption.think: The user has opened the game's store page and now wants to continue browsing information below the current top section, so the intended action is to scroll the main store page downward.
caption.action: Scroll down on the EA SPORTS FC™ 26 Steam store page.
caption.expectation: The page should move downward, revealing lower sections of the game listing such as additional details, feature information, or purchase-related content beneath the media and summary area.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the large light-blue button labeled "添加至您的愿望单" beneath the game media thumbnails. To its right is another blue button labeled "关注," and above is a gray notice bar about wishlist notification timing. The full-screen image confirms this is the Steam store page for EA SPORTS FC™ 26, with the game details on the right and the purchase/download section lower on the page. The target is a UI control button in the page content area, not a blank region or canvas object.
caption.think: The user likely wants to save the game to their Steam wishlist for later tracking, consistent with browsing the store page after scrolling down.
caption.action: Click the light-blue "添加至您的愿望单" button.
caption.expectation: The game should be added to the wishlist immediately, and the button area should update state to indicate success, such as changing label/state or showing that the item is now on the wishlist.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a broad, blurred view of the Steam store page with no semitransparent red X and no drag path, indicating a scroll action rather than a click target. The full-screen image shows the EA SPORTS FC™ 26 Steam store page in Chinese. Visible elements include the media gallery area at upper left, the game summary panel on the right with review text, release date, developer and publisher, a row of blue feature tags, a blue button labeled "查看您的队列," and lower on the page a large green banner labeled "下载《EA SPORTS FC™ 26》SHOWCASE" with two buttons on its right. The right-side scrollbar is partway down, so the page is currently below the top section.
caption.think: After adding the game to the wishlist, the user likely wants to move back upward in the main store page to revisit content above the current download/showcase section.
caption.action: Scroll up on the main Steam store page for EA SPORTS FC™ 26.
caption.expectation: The page should move upward, bringing earlier content higher on the store listing back into view, such as the wishlist area, media section, or upper game details.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the top navigation item with a white star icon and the label "愿望单 1". This is a clickable header control in Steam's store navigation bar, positioned just to the right of the search box and to the left of the blue cart button labeled "购物车 1". The full-screen image confirms the Steam store page for EA SPORTS FC™ 26 is open, and the wishlist button is in the top store toolbar rather than in the page content area.
caption.think: After adding the game to the wishlist, the user likely wants to open the wishlist from the top navigation to review saved items. The target is clearly a UI control in the top bar.
caption.action: Click the top-bar wishlist control labeled "愿望单 1" with the white star icon.
caption.expectation: The Steam interface should open the wishlist page or wishlist panel, showing the saved item(s). The immediate response is navigation/opening a new wishlist view.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on a long, flat, dark blue horizontal strip with no visible text, icon, button border, input cursor, or handle. This indicates the click is on a blank region rather than a distinct control. In the full-screen image, the Steam wishlist page titled "LIAOZY2 的愿望单" is open. Below the search/filter bar and above the footer, there is one wishlist item, "EA SPORTS FC™ 26," displayed in a large row. The clicked area aligns with the empty dark background area beneath the wishlist item and above the footer links, not on the game tile, not on the top toolbar, and not on any visible button.
caption.think: The user is likely clicking empty space on the wishlist page to clear focus or simply continue without activating any control. Since the target is a blank region, this should not open a menu or change modes.
caption.action: Click the blank dark-blue background area below the wishlist item list. This is a blank region, not a UI control, object, or handle.
caption.expectation: The immediate response should be minimal or none: any existing focus may clear, but no dialog should open, no item should be selected, and no tool or mode should change.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the Steam store search field in the top navigation bar with the text "nba 2" currently entered. To the right of the field is a blue square search button with a white magnifying-glass icon, and below the field an autocomplete dropdown is open. The dropdown lists matching results including "NBA 2K26," "《NBA 2K26》辉煌生涯第5季额外奖励," "NBA 2K25," and "《NBA 2K26》名人堂通行证：第5季," each with thumbnail art and prices. The full-screen image confirms this is the Steam wishlist page titled "LIAOZY2 的愿望单," with the single wishlist item "EA SPORTS FC 26" dimmed in the background while the active search overlay is focused. The typing is occurring in the global store search box at the top, likely extending the existing search text rather than starting from an empty field.
caption.think: The user is refining the Steam store search from the wishlist page to look for NBA 26-related results, likely aiming to find NBA 2K26. Since the action string specifies typing, the intent is to enter the requested text into the already-focused search field.
caption.action: Type "NBA 26" into the top Steam store search box, replacing the current query text if it is selected or otherwise updating the existing text in the focused field.
caption.expectation: The search field should display the typed query, and the autocomplete results below should refresh to NBA 26 / NBA 2K26-related matches.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the autocomplete search result row labeled "NBA 2K26." The row includes the game’s cover art on the left, the title "NBA 2K26" in white, a green discount badge "-75%", a gray struck-through old price, and the current price "CLP$17.497." This is a clickable result item, not a blank area or handle. The full-screen image confirms the Steam wishlist page is open with the top store search box containing "nba 26," and the search suggestions dropdown is expanded beneath it. The clicked item is the third result in that dropdown, above "NBA 2K25."
caption.think: The user has searched for NBA 26 and is now choosing the main game result from the autocomplete list. Clicking this result should navigate from the wishlist page to the NBA 2K26 store page.
caption.action: Click the autocomplete result row labeled "NBA 2K26" with the green "-75%" discount badge and price "CLP$17.497."
caption.expectation: Steam should open the NBA 2K26 store page, and the autocomplete dropdown should disappear as navigation begins.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the full Steam store page rather than a tightly targeted control, and there is no semitransparent red X, which matches a scroll action. The page is on the NBA 2K26 store listing. A large media player dominates the center-left, showing a warm orange promotional video frame with the white text "COME TO OUR HOUSE" across the bottom, playback controls, and a strip of thumbnail previews beneath it. On the right is the NBA 2K26 logo, a Chinese description, review summary links, release date, developer Visual Concepts, publisher 2K, and blue tag buttons. The full-screen context confirms this is the main store page inside Steam with the global store search bar at the top and a vertical scrollbar on the far right, indicating the main page can scroll further downward.
caption.think: The user likely wants to move down the NBA 2K26 store page to see content below the top trailer and summary section, such as screenshots, purchase options, editions, details, or reviews. Since no specific panel is isolated and the whole page is visible, the intended target is the main page scroll area.
caption.action: Scroll down on the main Steam store page.
caption.expectation: The page should move downward, shifting the trailer and top summary upward and revealing more of the NBA 2K26 store content below.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the large blue button labeled “添加至您的愿望单,” which is the Add to your wishlist control. It sits below the media thumbnail strip and to the left of smaller blue buttons including “关注” and a dropdown-like button. The full-screen image confirms this is the Steam store page for NBA 2K26, with the large trailer area above, the game information panel on the right, and purchase details lower on the page. The target is a UI control in the main content area, not a blank region or canvas object.
caption.think: The user likely wants to save NBA 2K26 to their Steam wishlist from its store page. Clicking this prominent wishlist button should toggle the game into the account's wishlist state.
caption.action: Click the blue “添加至您的愿望单” button.
caption.expectation: The game should be added to the wishlist, and the button should immediately change state or text to indicate it has been wishlisted.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the full Steam store page with no semitransparent red X, indicating a scroll action rather than a click. The page is on the NBA 2K26 store listing. The large trailer/media panel is still visible at the top left with the bold white text “WELCOME TO OUR HOUSE” over an orange-lit room scene, thumbnail previews below it, and the game summary text on the right. Directly beneath, the wishlist control now appears in its added state with a checkmark and the label “已在愿望单中,” alongside “关注” and “忽略.” Lower on the page, the “购买 NBA 2K26” purchase section is visible with a green “-75%” discount badge, the price “CLP$ 17.497,” and a green “添加至购物车” button. The full-screen context confirms this is the main Steam page content area with the page scrollbar on the right, so the intended region to move is the main store page.
caption.think: After confirming the game was added to the wishlist, the user likely wants to move slightly back upward in the store page to revisit content above or re-center the top media/details section. Since the whole page is shown and the action is explicitly ScrollUp, the intention is to scroll the main store page upward.
caption.action: Scroll up on the main Steam store page.
caption.expectation: The page should move upward slightly, bringing more of the upper NBA 2K26 store content into view while pushing the purchase section lower on the screen.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the top navigation control with a white star icon and the label “愿望单 2,” which is the Wishlist button. It sits in the dark blue Steam header bar between the blue search button on the left and the blue shopping cart button labeled “购物车 1” on the right. This is a clickable UI control in the top area, not a canvas object or blank region. The full-screen image confirms the current page is the Steam store listing for NBA 2K26, with the large media panel and game details visible below while the header remains accessible across the top.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open the wishlist after adding the game, probably to view wishlisted items or confirm NBA 2K26 appears there.
caption.action: Click the top-bar Wishlist control labeled “愿望单 2” with the white star icon.
caption.expectation: The wishlist page or wishlist panel should open immediately, replacing the current store content with the user's wishlist items.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the gray rectangular button labeled “选项,” which is an options dropdown control. Immediately to its right is another gray control labeled “排序依据：您的排序.” In the full-screen image, this is the Steam wishlist page titled “LIAOZY2 的愿望单,” with two listed games visible below, a dark blue header, the search bar near the top, and wishlist-related controls above the list. The target is a UI control in the top area of the wishlist content section.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open wishlist options to change how the wishlist is displayed or managed before taking another action on the listed items.
caption.action: Click the gray “选项” dropdown button.
caption.expectation: An options menu or dropdown panel should open from the “选项” control, showing wishlist-related settings or filters.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the radio option labeled “简洁” under the blue section heading “视图” inside an open dark-gray dropdown/filter panel. Just below it is another radio option labeled “详细,” which is currently selected with a filled blue circle. This target is a UI control in a menu/panel, not a blank area. In the full-screen image, the Steam wishlist page titled “LIAOZY2 的愿望单” is visible with the “选项” menu expanded over the wishlist items. The panel contains categories such as 视图, 平台, 种类, 价格, 折扣, 排除, and Deck 兼容性. The click target is specifically the “简洁” view mode option in the open options panel.
caption.think: The user likely wants to change the wishlist display from the currently selected detailed view to the compact/simple view so the items take up less space and the list becomes more condensed.
caption.action: Click the “简洁” radio option under “视图” in the open options panel.
caption.expectation: The wishlist view should switch from detailed to compact/simple layout, with the radio selection moving to “简洁” and the item list updating immediately, possibly with the options panel remaining open briefly or closing depending on Steam’s behavior.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the checkbox option labeled “游戏” under the blue heading “种类.” Below it are two unchecked options labeled “软件” and “DLC.” This is a UI control inside the open gray options/filter panel, specifically a filter checkbox rather than a blank area. In the full-screen image, the Steam wishlist page titled “LIAOZY2 的愿望单” is visible with the expanded options panel over the wishlist list. The panel includes sections such as 视图, 平台, 种类, 价格, 折扣, 排除, and DECK 兼容性.
caption.think: After switching the wishlist to compact view, the user likely wants to refine the displayed wishlist items by type, starting with the “游戏” category in the filter panel.
caption.action: Click the “游戏” checkbox under “种类” in the open options panel.
caption.expectation: The “游戏” filter should become selected with a checkmark, and the wishlist should update immediately to show only game-type items while the options panel remains open.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the radio option labeled “所有打折项目” in the “折扣” section of the open dark-gray filter panel. Above it, “愿望单中所有项目” is currently selected with a filled blue radio dot, and below it are “50% 或更高” and “75% 或更高.” This is a UI control inside the panel, specifically a radio button option rather than a blank area. In the full-screen image, the Steam wishlist page for “LIAOZY2 的愿望单” is open with the filters/options panel expanded over the wishlist. The compact wishlist entries remain visible behind the panel, and the previously selected “游戏” type filter is still checked.
caption.think: The user likely wants to narrow the wishlist results to only discounted items, changing the discount filter from showing all wishlist items to showing only entries that are currently on sale.
caption.action: Click the “所有打折项目” radio option under “折扣” in the open filter panel.
caption.expectation: The radio selection should move from “愿望单中所有项目” to “所有打折项目,” and the wishlist should update immediately to display only discounted items while the filter panel stays open.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X placed over a plain dark-blue area with no visible button, checkbox, text label, icon, slider handle, or other control directly under it. In the full-screen image, the Steam wishlist page for “LIAOZY2 的愿望单” is open, and the gray filter/options panel is still expanded in the center. The selected filters remain visible: “简洁” under 视图, “游戏” under 种类, and “所有打折项目” under 折扣. The red X is below the panel on the page background, so this is a click on a blank region rather than a UI control.
caption.think: The user likely wants to dismiss or close the open filter/options panel by clicking outside it on the page background, while keeping the chosen wishlist filters applied.
caption.action: Click the blank dark-blue page background below the open filter panel.
caption.expectation: The open filter/options panel should close, returning focus to the wishlist page while leaving the selected filters in effect.
